name: QSAM Biosciences, Inc.
summary: QSAM Biosciences, Inc., together with its subsidiary, engages in the manufacture and sale of compost and engineered soils from waste resources in the United States. Its products are used in the agriculture, horticulture, construction, landscape, site restoration, sod and turf, Silviculture and land reclamation, and infrastructure sectors. The company was formerly known as Q2Earth, Inc. and changed its name to QSAM Biosciences, Inc. in September 2020. QSAM Biosciences, Inc. was founded in 2004 and is based in Austin, Texas.
